independence: reviewer was separate from the implementation agent
method: comparative visual review of each committed Fill and faithful Outline pair at original PNG detail; contact sheets place Fill on the left and Outline on the right

adopted10k.statement: The adopted 10k Outline is a faithful comparative reproduction of the supplied Fill scene.

supportedCeiling50k.statement: The supported 50k Outline is a faithful comparative reproduction of the supplied Fill scene without a visible quality fallback.

generatedEvidenceBoundary: This attestation is maintained independently. production-reference-cli.js regenerates manifest.json, observations.json, vectors, and review rasters but never creates, changes, or deletes this file.
